matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Social Anthropological Research is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The MPhil is an academically challenging course that enables students to develop their knowledge of social anthropology to a high level of specialization within a short time. It is a demanding course that enables students to develop their knowledge of social anthropology to a high level of specialization within a short time. It is designed for postgraduate students who have a strong background in Social Anthropology, either on its own or as part of a joint degree; and who want to engage directly and more deeply than before with debates in contemporary social anthropology. The course provides specialist social anthropological training in a dynamic programme of research-led teaching and professional development.
